message:
test(pthread): MR lock/trylock unlock roundtrip identity (bd-73gu)

Add two metamorphic roundtrip proptests on mutex_contract_transition:

prop_lock_unlock_roundtrip_is_identity
  Unlocked -Lock-> LockedBySelf -Unlock-> Unlocked, with errno=0 and
  non-blocking unlock, for every valid mutex kind.

prop_trylock_unlock_roundtrip_is_identity
  Same identity via TryLock entry, exercising the independent acquisition
  arm of the state machine.

These close a gap in the existing proptest suite: prior tests asserted
individual arrows (Init→Unlocked, LockedBySelf+Lock relock semantics)
but never chained a lock + unlock roundtrip across kinds, so a regression
that (e.g.) returned Destroyed from Unlock or surfaced spurious EPERM
on the clean path would have escaped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
